scope: Fallout: New Vegas flat UI, dialogue, inventory, barter, stats, quests, and VR panel placement boundary

policy.luaRole: generic UI mode/window glue and VR panel/input placement only
prohibitedLiveContent: proof-only named NPC/menu strings in normal UI code
allowedCompatibilityConstants: FNV canonical currency record Caps001, resolved through the loaded store
Pip-Boy category captions such as ALL, WEAPONS, APPAREL, AID, MISC / AMMO
Pip-Boy pane titles such as DATA / QUESTS
window coordinates and MyGUI layout/resource names

requiredSources.runtimeDataPath: merchant actor inventory plus world-owned merchant containers/items
loaded ESM4 MiscItem store record with editor ID Caps001
ESM4 dialogue INFO/result records and selected actor
existing native Map, Inventory, Magic/Data, Stats windows
proofNeedles: Fallout inventory mode opens all native panes

requiredSources.runtimeDataPath: Lua can override existing engine windows but does not own FNV flat data models
proofNeedles: At the moment it is only possible to override existing windows

requiredFutureEvidence: flat save/load launch using FalloutNV.esm and Save330 or current playable save
captured Pip-Boy panes with non-empty runtime item rows
captured barter window with merchant-owned items from actor/container ownership
captured DATA/QUESTS pane with ESM4 quest runtime rows
captured dialogue topic/result transition into barter or quest mutation where applicable
log lines identifying runtime FormIDs or owned container sources for every row class
